nasb.text: The twelfth for the twelfth month was Heldai the Netophathite of Othniel; and in his division were 24,000.

esv.text: Twelfth, for the twelfth month, was Heldai the Netophathite, of Othniel; in his division were 24,000.

cnv.text: 十二月第十二班的軍長是俄陀聶家族尼陀法人黑玳，他那一班有二萬四千人。

ccb.text: 俄陀聂族的尼陀法人黑玳负责第十二班，在十二月当值，他班内有两万四千人。
